The '''Colony Class 23669 power generator''' was a heavy-duty generator that cost almost 25 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and was more than capable for supplying power to an entire city.

==History==
One was hijacked from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebels]] to make up for technological losses in the fallout of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="Slaying" />

{{Tech-stub}}
